steps.title: Use the side ratios
steps.content:
The three pairs of corresponding sides have the same ratio.
$$\frac{AB}{DE}=\frac{BC}{EF}=\frac{AC}{DF}=3$$
So triangle $ABC$ is similar to triangle $DEF$.

steps.title: Match corresponding angles
steps.content: The side order gives the vertex correspondence from $A$ to $D$, from $B$ to $E$, and from $C$ to $F$. Corresponding angles in similar triangles are equal.

steps.title: Use the given angle
steps.content: Angle $BAC$ measures $20$ degrees, so the corresponding angle $EDF$ also measures $20$ degrees. The answer is 20.
